pageContext.name: Stephen Strange
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Stephen Strange!   From Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness, this Stephen Strange Art Scale Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted.  Doctor Strange fans, don't miss your chance to add the Doctor Strange statue to your Marvel collectibles display!
